arts.ttl: Hull City must change 'annoying' Championship narrative to rescue season
arts.sum: Now it's why the Tigers find themselves going into Christmas bottom of the Championship and staring League One in the face, albeit with time to turn things around, if they can find a way to win games of football again. The only way the atmosphere can be improved and turned in their favour is to start playing well, scoring goals and ultimately, winning football matches.

arts.ttl: Hull City star facing race against time to be fit for pivotal Swansea City clash
arts.sum: "It has been a good week to work with calmness, but with a clear idea of what we want to be and how we potentially can win the game on Saturday. "Well, I think it has been very positive from the first training session (on Monday), we had a very, very hard two days for the boys when we needed to work out some concerns but also with high intensity in terms of physicality and we were able to go through the details that we missed last week," he said.

arts.ttl: Preview: Hull City vs. Swansea City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Hull City and Swansea City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Hull City out to avoid unwanted Championship tag after nightmare run of form
arts.sum: City's 16 points after 21 games is one of the higher totals of those bottom during the festive period,and a positive result this weekend would see them match the 19 Huddersfield had in 2022, and they eventually escaped. In the past 10 Championship seasons, seven of the 10 teams bottom on Christmas Day have gone on to be relegated to League One, a stark warning to the Tigers about their current plight and a realisation for anyone who thinks the Tigers are not in a rather large spot of bother after a shambolic start to the campaign.
Aidan Perkins has a score prediction for all 12 matches taking place in the Championship across another busy weekend in the second tier.
